props.name: disabled
props.description: Disables all checkboxes in the list.

props.name: error
props.description: Shows an error state on all checkboxes in the list.

props.name: maxWidth
props.description: Sets the maximum width of the checkbox list container.

props.name: name
props.description: The name for the checkbox list group. Used as group identifier in change events.

props.name: size
props.description: Sets the size of the checkbox list. 'compact' reduces spacing between items.

props.name: testId
props.description: Sets a data-testid attribute for automated testing.

props.name: value
props.description: Array of currently selected checkbox values.

events.name: onChange
events.description: Callback fired when the selected values change.

props.name: id
props.description: Sets the id attribute of the underlying web component.

props.name: mb
props.description: Sets the bottom margin spacing token.

props.name: ml

props.name: mr
props.description: Sets the right margin spacing token.

props.name: mt
props.description: Sets the top margin spacing token.
